metadata.title: Company Profile Manual Audit Evidence
metadata.purpose: Durable hand-reviewed evidence for company profile enrichment, contact discovery, trademark follow-up, and website cultivar-count checks.
notes: Do not edit data/owner_profiles.json directly; it is generated.
Use this file for sourced manual evidence that should survive data rebuilds.
Leave fields blank when evidence has not been reviewed.

profiles.auditNotes: Parent rollup for IFG, SNFL, and Sheehan-branded grape genetics. Large benchmark platform, not a target in current size range.
SNFL site and social links use Sheehan grape branding; Sheehan Genetics and Timothy P. Sheehan are rolled into SNFL for sourcing-table hygiene.
Private blueberry platform; Ridley Bell rollup needs continued evidence review.
Remove broad aliases that could pull unrelated university plant-science departments into the company profile.

profiles.candidateParentBasis: Local US patent records list Agro Selections Fruits with Arsene/Laurence Maillard as breeders, but many CPVO records are breeder-only and should not be merged until holder/applicant evidence is verified.
profiles.auditNotes: High-count peach/stone-fruit breeder signal. Keep visible in QA queue until legal holder evidence is clearer.

profiles.candidateParentBasis: Local US patent records list Agro Selections Fruits with Arsene/Laurence Maillard as breeders, but CPVO rows split the person names in multiple forms.
profiles.auditNotes: Do not merge yet because this may double-count the combined Arsene/Laurence profile.

profiles.candidateParentBasis: Large CPVO peach/nectarine breeder signal, but current local data does not identify a reliable company holder.
profiles.auditNotes: Potentially interesting succession-style profile; needs source-linked company/holder research before consolidation.

profiles.candidateParentBasis: Large CPVO stone-fruit breeder signal with repeated co-breeder names; current local data does not identify a reliable parent company.
profiles.auditNotes: Do not roll into Zaiger or another platform without holder evidence.
